name: Day 10: Employee/Customer
description:
Day 10: Employee/Customer

Hell is a place where the most cunning come out on top, so stores are known for doing ANYTHING to make the most money out of you, the clothing store you work in is no exception, with the music they play being hypnotic and making the customers all the more willing. You found Stella shopping there, so of course, as a good employee, you went there to "help" her with her shopping

Day 10 already? It's all going so fast for some reason, geez
creator: V33-N0C3D4
